prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and sharpen the file that carried the most weight — most likely the strat

risks_fired.evidence: most likely the strategy kernel, agent set, plan, or central synthesizer's rules, whichever governed how the agents argued and selected
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add a deterministic fallback path so Claude skips the re-confirm pause: e.g. 'if uncertain, default to the central synthesizer rules file'

risks_fired.evidence: Multi-step shape (scan folder → identify file → analyze session events → rewrite → report) invites a narrated plan before Claude opens a single file
risks_fired.fix_hint: Prime the student inside the fence or lead-in: 'Claude will describe its plan before scanning — skim past the opening paragraph and look for the one-line file-path confirmation'

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 3-5 lines: which file you rewrote, what you added, what you sharpened, what you removed, and why
risks_fired.fix_hint: Tighten the contract: 'if you cannot produce a before/after quote for a claimed change, do not claim it'

risks_fired.evidence: surface at least two flywheel stalls... at least one under-specified role... at least one proposal the room converged on too fast
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add an over-flag nudge: 'flag more than the minimum if session evidence supports it — underflagging is the failure mode'

risks_fired.evidence: Preserve any rule not directly contradicted by session evidence
risks_fired.fix_hint: Explicit preserve boundary is in place; no prompt change needed unless post-cohort evidence shows over-rewriting

risks_fired.evidence: Where did a critique land and change a selection? — open-ended positive-scan question satisfices on easy wins
risks_fired.fix_hint: Pin the critique question as done for the convergence question if post-cohort results show soft answers
